steps.t: Woodcutter Huel asked you to return to where you found the axe, in south-western Tharbad, and to see if you can find and help its missing owner.
The earth is trampled to the south-west.
The earth is trampled to the south-west.
Woodcutter Huel is waiting just inside the southern entrance to Tharbad for news of the axe's owner.
